title: Kaworus Tabris other abilities
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu's/Tabris' other abilities?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Apr 03, 2009 12:32 pm Did Kaworu have other abilities that we don't know about or wasn't show on screen? From what was seen in episode 24 that Kaworu has the ability to levitate and sync with other Evangelions if there soul is hiding them selves. In the Angelic Days Eva-Universe it looked like Kaworu can perfectly sync with any Eva still based on how he was able to hijack Kensuke's Eva unit and pilot it with no problem. Also it seems he can never age or become any age he wants, wipe people's memories, and control Adam somehow. Also it looked like he could make other world's as seen in the 5th volume of the manga... So... Discuss?

[]: Re: Kaworu's/Tabris' other abilities?             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Apr 03, 2009 1:03 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Did Kaworu have other abilities that we don't know about or wasn't show on screen?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Apr 03, 2009 2:07 pm Kaworu, like all other Angels, can do absolutely-fucking-anything the plot demands.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Fri Apr 03, 2009 2:24 pm He was only around for one episode, there isn't much that we know. This will be a fun topic for rebuild since we're going to see much more of him there. I agree with Aura, his massive AT field allows for pretty much anything.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Apr 03, 2009 2:44 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Kaworu, like all other Angels, can do absolutely-fucking-anything the plot demands.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Apr 03, 2009 3:05 pm master_lloyd wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: Kaworu, like all other Angels, can do absolutely-fucking-anything the plot demands.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Apr 03, 2009 3:50 pm Axell wrote: master_lloyd wrote: AuraTwilight wrote: Kaworu, like all other Angels, can do absolutely-fucking-anything the plot demands.

[]:             Quote Post by VoidEater » Fri Apr 03, 2009 3:55 pm ^ You mean truth i ness?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Apr 03, 2009 5:04 pm ^ Yeah. I kinda forgot how it was spelled on his show. Topic is getting derailed.

[]: Re: Kaworu's/Tabris' other abilities?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 03, 2009 5:09 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: From what was seen in episode 24 that Kaworu has the ability to levitate and sync with other Evangelions if there soul is hiding them selves.

[]:             Quote Post by pablumatic » Fri Apr 03, 2009 7:44 pm He told Rei he was just like her. So I guess he has the same powers as her/Lilith. That's about as far as we'll ever get on this subject.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 03, 2009 8:03 pm pablumatic wrote: He told Rei he was just like her.

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Fri Apr 03, 2009 8:26 pm Or Rei could be a boy. Kaworu has the ability to walk around the moon naked, and make straight men question their sexuality.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Apr 03, 2009 8:28 pm rberlin wrote: Or Rei could be a boy.

[]:             Quote Post by rberlin » Fri Apr 03, 2009 8:30 pm Everywhere except where it should be.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 03, 2009 8:52 pm rberlin wrote: Or Rei could be a boy.

[]: Re: Kaworu's/Tabris' other abilities?             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri Apr 03, 2009 8:57 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: In the Angelic Days Eva-Universe it looked like Kaworu can perfectly sync with any Eva still based on how he was able to hijack Kensuke's Eva unit and pilot it with no problem. Also it seems he can never age or become any age he wants, wipe people's memories, and control Adam somehow. Also it looked like he could make other world's as seen in the 5th volume of the manga. Discuss?

[]: Re: Kaworu's/Tabris' other abilities?             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Apr 03, 2009 9:22 pm Guyver Spawn wrote: You do know that GOS2 is not cannon... Earth-311 is cannon.

[]: Re: Kaworu's/Tabris' other abilities?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Apr 03, 2009 9:55 pm Alaska Slim: Read Part C here, pretty please. Joseph the PRPD wrote: Kensuke's Eva unit

[]: Re: Kaworu's/Tabris' other abilities?             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Apr 03, 2009 10:26 pm Reichu wrote: Alaska Slim...
